findings.title: Name does not follow standard agent naming pattern
findings.detail: Name "bmad-suno-style-prompt-builder" does not follow bmad-{code}-agent-{name} or bmad-agent-{name} pattern. This is a pre-pass deterministic finding.
findings.action: Evaluate whether this skill intentionally uses a non-agent naming convention (it is a workflow skill, not a persona agent) and document the rationale, or rename to follow the standard pattern.

findings.title: Missing ## Identity section
findings.detail: No dedicated Identity section exists. The Overview embeds an implicit identity ('Act as a music producer's sound engineer') but this is not in its own section. Pre-pass deterministic finding.
findings.action: Add a dedicated ## Identity section after Overview with a clear one-sentence persona, e.g.: 'You are a music producer's sound engineer who translates musical intent into precise, model-optimized Suno style prompts.'

findings.title: Missing ## Communication Style section
findings.detail: No Communication Style section exists. The skill interacts conversationally with users (Step 1 says 'Collect what you need conversationally') but provides no style guidance or examples. Pre-pass deterministic finding.
findings.action: Add a ## Communication Style section with 3-5 concrete examples showing how to ask about genre, present decompositions, and offer refinements. The tone should match a knowledgeable but approachable sound engineer.

findings.title: Missing ## Principles section
findings.detail: No Principles section exists. The skill embeds domain-critical principles throughout workflow steps (e.g., 'Never put artist names in the style prompt', 'front-load the critical zone', 'negative prompts are unreliable') but these are scattered rather than consolidated. Pre-pass deterministic finding.
findings.action: Add a ## Principles section that consolidates the top 5-7 guiding principles, e.g.: 'Front-load all essential descriptors within the first 200 characters (critical zone)', 'Decompose artist references into concrete sonic descriptors — never use artist names directly', 'Translate negative intentions into positive instructions'.

findings.title: Embedded identity is actionable but not in a dedicated section
findings.detail: The Overview contains 'Act as a music producer's sound engineer — you understand how to translate musical intent into the precise language Suno's models respond to best.' This is a good identity statement but is buried in a paragraph rather than standing alone.
findings.action: Extract this into a dedicated ## Identity section for maximum behavioral priming effect.

findings.title: Description quality is strong
findings.detail: Description follows the two-part format with specific quoted trigger phrases ('build a style prompt', 'generate style prompt', 'create a Suno prompt'). It clearly distinguishes this skill from other skills in the module. No action needed.

findings.title: Activation sequence is logically ordered
findings.detail: Sequence is: (1) detect headless vs interactive mode, (2) load config via bmad-init, (3) greet user, (4) proceed to Step 1. Config loads before config vars are used, and headless detection precedes interactive flow. Includes proper fallback if bmad-init is unavailable.
findings.action: None required — activation sequence is sound.

findings.title: Headless mode is well-documented but lacks a dedicated headless activation prompt
findings.detail: The Activation Mode Detection section thoroughly documents headless sub-modes (from-profile, custom, refine, migrate), defaults, and error contracts. However, there is no explicit 'wake prompt' or default task that the agent performs when invoked headless without a sub-mode flag — just '--headless with a profile name' falls through to hybrid mode.
findings.action: Consider adding explicit documentation for what happens with bare '--headless' (no sub-mode, no profile name) — currently this case appears unhandled.

findings.title: No config header with language variables found in README.md
findings.detail: Pre-pass deterministic finding. README.md lacks a config header with language variables.
findings.action: Add a config header with language variables to README.md if this prompt file requires configuration.

findings.title: No progression condition keywords found in README.md
findings.detail: Pre-pass deterministic finding. No progression condition keywords were detected in the README prompt file.
findings.action: Add progression conditions to README.md to define how the skill advances through its workflow stages.

summary.assessment: The skill has strong domain content and a well-structured workflow, but is missing three required behavioral sections (Identity, Communication Style, Principles). The embedded identity and scattered principles are high quality — they just need to be extracted into dedicated sections for proper AI behavioral priming. Headless mode is thorough but has one edge case gap.
